zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Burgoyne II於大約1443年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓時，他的父親Thomas Burgoyne21歲，母親Alice Amelia Tay22歲。他於1460年之前與Lady Elizabeth Staverton在英國坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1500年在他的家鄉享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Burgoyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Middle English Burgoin, Old French Bourgogne, Latin Burgundia), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the West Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404, duke from 1363).

variants.name: Burgin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy, Old French Bourgogne, Bourgoin ‘the Burgundian’. Alternatively, from the synonymous name Burgoyne .
Swiss German (Bürgin): from a pet form of the personal name Burkhard (see Burkhart ).

variants.name: Burgamy
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Burgany, itself a variant of Burgoyne (Middle English Bourgoine, Burgonye ‘Burgundy’). This form of the name is now rare or absent in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Burgoyne II was born about 1443, in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Burgoyne, was 21 and his mother, Alice Amelia Tay, was 22. He married Lady Elizabeth Staverton before 1460, in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1500, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Burgoyne II est né environ 1443, à Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Burgoyne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alice Amelia Tay, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Staverton avant 1460, à Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1500, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Burgoyne II um 1443 in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Burgoyne 21 und seine Mutter Alice Amelia Tay 22. Er hat vor 1460 in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England Lady Elizabeth Staverton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1500 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Staverton prima del 1460, nel Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1500, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Burgoyne IIが約1443年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアロング スタントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Burgoyneは21歳，母Alice Amelia Tayは22歳であった。1460年以前にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアロング スタントンでLady Elizabeth Stavertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1500年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Burgoyne II(이)가 대략 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 론그 스탠턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Burgoyne(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Amelia Tay(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1460년 이전 영국 캄브리지실르 론그 스탠턴에서 Lady Elizabeth Staverton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Burgoyne II родился около 1443 г. в местности лонг стантон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Burgoyne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Amelia Tay, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Staverton перед 1460 г. в местности лонг стантон, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1500 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.
